//===== rAthena Script =======================================
//= Shadow Capsule
//===== Description: =========================================
//= All-slot draw: 100,000 Zeny.
//= Selected-slot draw: 300,000 Zeny.
//============================================================

prontera,174,180,4	script	Shadow Capsule#EA	731,{
	mes "[Shadow Capsule]";
	mes "All-slot draw: 100,000 Zeny.";
	mes "Selected-slot draw: 300,000 Zeny.";
	mes "Duplicate results are possible.";
	next;
	.@choice = select("All shadow gear:Shadow weapon:Shadow shield:Shadow armor:Shadow shoes:Shadow earring:Shadow pendant:Close");
	if (.@choice == 8)
		close;

	.@price = (.@choice == 1) ? 100000 : 300000;
	switch (.@choice) {
	case 1:
		.@item = .SAll[rand(getarraysize(.SAll))];
		break;
	case 2:
		.@item = .SWeapon[rand(getarraysize(.SWeapon))];
		break;
	case 3:
		.@item = .SShield[rand(getarraysize(.SShield))];
		break;
	case 4:
		.@item = .SArmor[rand(getarraysize(.SArmor))];
		break;
	case 5:
		.@item = .SShoes[rand(getarraysize(.SShoes))];
		break;
	case 6:
		.@item = .SEarring[rand(getarraysize(.SEarring))];
		break;
	case 7:
		.@item = .SPendant[rand(getarraysize(.SPendant))];
		break;
	}

	if (Zeny < .@price) {
		mes "[Shadow Capsule]";
		mes "You do not have enough Zeny.";
		close;
	}

	if (!checkweight(.@item,1)) {
		mes "[Shadow Capsule]";
		mes "Your inventory is full or too heavy.";
		close;
	}

	Zeny -= .@price;
	getitem .@item,1;
	logmes "[EA_SHADOW] aid="+getcharid(3)+" cid="+getcharid(0)+" item="+.@item+" price="+.@price;
	mes "[Shadow Capsule]";
	mes "You received ^0055FF"+getitemname(.@item)+"^000000.";
	close;

OnInit:
	setarray .SAll[0],15280,24000,24001,24002,24003,24004,24005,24006,24007,24008,24009,24010,24011,24012,24013,24014,24015,24016,24017,24018,24019,24020,24021,24022,24023,24024,24025,24026,24027,24028,24029,24030,24031,24032,24033,24034,24035,24036,24037,24038,24039,24040,24041,24042,24043,24044,24045,24046,24047,24048,24049,24050,24051,24052,24053,24054,24055,24056,24057,24058,24059,24060,24061,24062,24063,24064,24065,24066,24067,24068,24069,24070,24071,24072,24073,24074,24075,24076,24077,24078;
	setarray .SAll[80],24079,24080,24081,24082,24083,24084,24085,24086,24087,24088,24089,24090,24091,24092,24093,24094,24095,24096,24097,24098,24099,24100,24101,24102,24103,24104,24105,24106,24107,24108,24109,24110,24111,24112,24113,24114,24115,24116,24117,24118,24119,24120,24121,24122,24123,24124,24125,24126,24127,24128,24129,24130,24131,24132,24133,24134,24135,24136,24137,24138,24139,24140,24141,24142,24143,24144,24145,24146,24147,24148,24149,24150,24151,24152,24153,24154,24155,24156,24157,24158;
	setarray .SAll[160],24159,24160,24161,24162,24163,24164,24165,24166,24167,24168,24169,24170,24171,24172,24173,24174,24175,24176,24177,24178,24179,24180,24181,24182,24183,24184,24185,24186,24187,24188,24189,24190,24191,24192,24193,24194,24195,24196,24197,24198,24199,24200,24201,24202,24203,24204,24205,24206,24207,24208,24209,24210,24211,24212,24213,24214,24215,24216,24217,24218,24219,24220,24221,24222,24223,24224,24225,24226,24227,24228,24229,24230,24231,24232,24233,24234,24235,24236,24237,24238;
	setarray .SAll[240],24239,24240,24241,24242,24243,24244,24245,24246,24247,24248,24249,24250,24251,24252,24253,24254,24255,24256,24257,24258,24259,24260,24261,24262,24263,24264,24265,24266,24267,24268,24269,24270,24271,24272,24273,24274,24275,24276,24277,24278,24279,24280,24281,24282,24283,24284,24285,24286,24287,24288,24289,24290,24291,24292,24293,24294,24295,24296,24297,24298,24299,24300,24301,24302,24303,24304,24305,24306,24307,24308,24309,24310,24311,24312,24313,24314,24315,24316,24317,24318;
	setarray .SAll[320],24319,24320,24321,24322,24323,24324,24325,24326,24327,24328,24329,24330,24331,24332,24333,24334,24335,24336,24337,24338,24339,24340,24341,24342,24343,24344,24345,24346,24347,24348,24349,24350,24351,24352,24353,24354,24355,24356,24357,24358,24359,24360,24361,24362,24363,24364,24365,24366,24367,24368,24369,24370,24371,24372,24373,24374,24375,24376,24377,24378,24379,24380,24381,24382,24383,24384,24385,24386,24393,24394,24395,24396,24397,24398,24399,24400,24401,24402,24403,24404;
	setarray .SAll[400],24405,24406,24407,24408,24409,24410,24411,24412,24413,24414,24415,24423,24424,24425,24426,24427,24428,24429,24430,24431,24432,24433,24434,24435,24436,24437,24438,24439,24440,24441,24442,24443,24444,24445,24446,24447,24448,24449,24450,24451,24452,24453,24454,24455,24456,24457,24458,24459,24460,24461,24462,24463,24464,24465,24466,24467,24468,24469,24470,24471,24472,24473,24474,24475,24476,24477,24478,24479,24480,24481,24482,24483,24484,24485,24486,24487,24488,24489,24490,24491;
	setarray .SAll[480],24492,24493,24494,24495,24496,24497,24498,24499,24500,24501,24502,24503,24504,24505,24506,24507,24508,24509,24510,24511,24512,24513,24514,24515,24516,24517,24518,24519,24520,24521,24522,24523,24524,24525,24526,24527,24528,24529,24530,24531,24532,24533,24534,24535,24536,24537,24538,24539,24540,24541,24542,24543,24544,24545,24546,24547,24548,24549,24550,24551,24552,24553,24554,24555,24556,24557,24558,24559,24560,24561,24562,24563,24564,24565,24566,24567,24568,24569,24570,24571;
	setarray .SAll[560],24572,24573,24574,24575,24576,24577,24578,24579,24580,24581,24582,24583,24601,24602,24603,24604,24605,24606,24607,24608,24609,24610,24611,24612,24613,24614,24615,24616,24617,24618,24619,24620,24621,24622,24623,24624,24625,24626,24627,24628,24629,24630,24631,24632,24633,24634,24635,24636,24637,24638,24639,24640,24641,24642,24643,24644,24645,24646,24647,24648,24649,24650,24651,24652,24653,24654,24655,24656,24657,24658,24659,24660,24661,24662,24663,24664,24665,24666,24667,24668;
	setarray .SAll[640],24669,24670,24671,24672,24673,24674,24675,24676,24677,24678,24679,24680,24681,24682,24683,24685,24686,24722,24723,24724,24725,24726,24727,24728,24729,24730,24731,24732,24733,24734,24735,24736,24737,24738,24745,24746,24747,24748,24749,24750,24751,24752,24753,24754,24755,24756,24757,24758,24759,24760,24761,24762,24763,24764,24765,24766,24767,24768,24770,24778,24779,24780,24781,24782,24783,24792,24793,24800,24801,24802,24803,24804,24805,24806,24807,24808,24809,24810,24811,24812;
	setarray .SAll[720],24813,24814,24815,24816,24817,24818,24819,24820,24821,24822,24823,24824,24825,24826,24827,24828,24829,24830,24831,24832,24833,24834,24835,24836,24837,24838,24839,24840,24841,24842,24843,24844,24845,24846,24847,24848,24849,24850,24851,24852,24853,24854,24855,24856,24857,24858,24859,24860,24861,24862,24863,24864,24865,24866,24867,24868,24869,24870,24871,24872,24873,24874,24875,24876,24877,24878,24879,24883,24884,24885,24886,24887,24888,24906,24907,24908,24909,24910,24911,24912;
	setarray .SAll[800],24913,24914,24915,24916,24917,24918,24919,24920,24921,24922,24923,24924,24925,24926,24927,24928,24929,24936,24937,24938,24939,24940,24941,24942,24943,24944,24945,24946,24947,24948,24949,24950,24951,24952,24953,24954,24955,24956,24957,24958,24959,24967,24968,24969,24970,24971,24972,24973,24974,24975,24976,24977,24978,24979,24980,24981,24982,24983,24984,24985,24986,24987,24988,24989,24990,24993,24994,24995,24996,24997,24998,24999,28391,28392,1270000,1270001,1270002,1270003,1270004,1270005;
	setarray .SAll[880],1270006,1270007,1270008,1270009,1270010,1270011,1270012,1270013,1270014,1270015,1270016,1270023,1270024,1270025,1270026,1270027,1270028,1270029,1270030,1270031,1270032,1270033,1270034,1270035,1270036,1270037,1270038,1270039,1270040,1270041,1270042,1270043,1270044,1270045,1270046,1270079,1270080,1270081,1270082,1270083,1270084,1270085,1270086,1270087,1270088,1270089,1270090,1270091,1270092,1270093,1270094,1270095,1270096,1270097,1270098,1270099,1270100,1270101,1270102,1270115,1270116,1270117,1270118,1270119,1270120,1270121,1270122,1270123,1270124,1270125,1270126,1270130,1270131,1270132,1270133,1270134,1270135,1270136,1270137,1270138;
	setarray .SAll[960],1270139,1270140,1270141;
	setarray .SWeapon[0],24001,24007,24012,24019,24022,24031,24032,24033,24034,24043,24075,24076,24077,24078,24087,24099,24104,24110,24117,24123,24129,24135,24141,24147,24152,24156,24157,24158,24159,24160,24161,24162,24163,24164,24165,24170,24171,24172,24173,24174,24175,24176,24177,24178,24179,24183,24223,24224,24227,24228,24233,24282,24283,24284,24285,24286,24287,24288,24289,24290,24291,24292,24293,24294,24295,24296,24297,24298,24299,24300,24324,24328,24329,24335,24343,24356,24358,24360,24363,24370;
	setarray .SWeapon[80],24380,24383,24386,24423,24425,24427,24428,24429,24430,24431,24432,24434,24435,24436,24437,24438,24439,24443,24449,24455,24461,24467,24473,24479,24485,24491,24497,24503,24509,24515,24521,24527,24533,24539,24545,24551,24557,24563,24569,24575,24581,24601,24607,24613,24619,24622,24628,24634,24640,24646,24652,24655,24673,24686,24725,24734,24736,24738,24745,24751,24753,24755,24757,24759,24761,24768,24770,24779,24792;
	setarray .SShield[0],24002,24008,24015,24026,24039,24044,24052,24053,24054,24055,24056,24057,24058,24059,24060,24061,24083,24086,24090,24113,24116,24122,24128,24134,24140,24146,24182,24198,24199,24200,24201,24202,24203,24204,24205,24206,24207,24209,24211,24213,24215,24232,24241,24244,24301,24302,24303,24304,24305,24306,24307,24308,24309,24310,24311,24312,24313,24314,24315,24316,24317,24318,24319,24323,24327,24332,24336,24342,24345,24366,24374,24394,24397,24399,24441,24447,24453,24459,24465,24471;
	setarray .SShield[80],24477,24483,24489,24495,24501,24507,24513,24519,24525,24531,24537,24543,24549,24555,24561,24567,24573,24579,24602,24608,24614,24616,24623,24629,24635,24641,24647,24653,24656,24674,24683,24685,24722,24732,24733,24735,24737,24746,24752,24754,24756,24758,24760,24762,24767,24780,24793;
	setarray .SArmor[0],15280,24000,24006,24013,24024,24027,24028,24029,24030,24037,24040,24072,24073,24074,24081,24084,24091,24093,24095,24097,24112,24114,24120,24126,24132,24138,24144,24154,24180,24186,24187,24188,24189,24190,24191,24192,24193,24194,24195,24197,24216,24219,24220,24221,24222,24242,24245,24269,24270,24271,24272,24273,24274,24275,24276,24277,24278,24279,24280,24281,24325,24326,24330,24331,24334,24337,24344,24347,24348,24349,24350,24351,24352,24354,24375,24376,24377,24378,24379,24395;
	setarray .SArmor[80],24398,24401,24402,24403,24404,24408,24410,24412,24414,24424,24426,24433,24440,24446,24452,24458,24464,24470,24476,24482,24488,24494,24500,24506,24512,24518,24524,24530,24536,24542,24548,24554,24560,24566,24572,24578,24603,24609,24615,24617,24624,24630,24636,24642,24648,24654,24657,24663,24667,24669,24675,24679,24723,24728,24747,24764,24778,24800,24804,24808,24812,24816,24820,24824,24828,24832,24836,24840,24844,24848,24852,24856,24860,24864,24868,24872,24874,24883,24908,24912;
	setarray .SArmor[160],24916,24920,24924,24928,24938,24942,24946,24950,24954,24958,24969,24973,24977,24981,24985,24989,24993,24997,1270001,1270005,1270009,1270013,1270025,1270029,1270033,1270037,1270041,1270045,1270081,1270085,1270089,1270093,1270097,1270101,1270117,1270121,1270125,1270132,1270136,1270140;
	setarray .SShoes[0],24003,24009,24014,24025,24038,24045,24062,24063,24064,24065,24066,24067,24068,24069,24070,24071,24082,24085,24092,24094,24096,24098,24111,24115,24121,24127,24133,24139,24145,24181,24196,24208,24210,24212,24214,24231,24240,24243,24256,24257,24258,24259,24260,24261,24262,24263,24264,24265,24266,24267,24268,24320,24333,24338,24341,24346,24353,24355,24367,24373,24393,24396,24400,24405,24406,24407,24409,24411,24413,24415,24442,24448,24454,24460,24466,24472,24478,24484,24490,24496;

	setarray .SEarring[0],24004,24010,24016,24018,24021,24035,24042,24049,24050,24051,24079,24088,24100,24102,24105,24107,24109,24118,24124,24130,24136,24142,24148,24150,24153,24166,24168,24184,24217,24225,24229,24234,24236,24238,24246,24247,24248,24249,24322,24339,24357,24361,24364,24368,24371,24381,24384,24445,24451,24457,24463,24469,24475,24481,24487,24493,24499,24505,24511,24517,24523,24529,24535,24541,24547,24553,24559,24565,24571,24577,24583,24604,24610,24621,24625,24631,24637,24643,24649,24658;

	setarray .SPendant[80],24659,24662,24668,24671,24678,24682,24726,24731,24750,24765,24783,24803,24807,24811,24815,24819,24823,24827,24831,24835,24839,24843,24847,24851,24855,24859,24863,24867,24871,24876,24878,24885,24887,24907,24911,24915,24919,24923,24927,24937,24941,24945,24949,24953,24957,24968,24972,24976,24980,24984,24988,24996,1270000,1270004,1270008,1270012,1270016,1270024,1270028,1270032,1270036,1270040,1270044,1270080,1270084,1270088,1270092,1270096,1270100,1270116,1270120,1270124,1270131,1270135,1270139;
	end;
}
